_meta.note: REAL proof-of-concept dossier. All values from live web data pulled during POC. No mock. Tags: FACT|ESTIMATE|NEEDS-TOOL|NO-DATA. Never a guessed point number.

tag_legend.FACT: direct extraction (live HTML, observed SERP, public counts, sitemap, Places)
tag_legend.ESTIMATE: LLM inference / benchmark extrapolation / formula output — carries visible premise
tag_legend.NEEDS-TOOL: data exists but requires headless/free-API not yet wired; explicit gap, not a guess

business.name: Clube dos Bichos — Petshop e Clinica/Hospital Veterinaria 24h
units: R. Comandante Costa 1718 - Centro Sul, Cuiaba-MT, 78020-400
R. Barao de Melgaco 1756 - Porto, Cuiaba-MT, 78025-300

metrics.label: Instagram primary @clube.dos.bichos
metrics.value: 4371 followers / 780 posts

metrics.label: Instagram secondary @clubedosbichoscimv
metrics.value: 8520 followers / 1231 posts (real flagship)

metrics.label: Split-brand problem
metrics.value: 12.9k combined but fragmented across two inconsistent handles

metrics.label: Facebook Clubedosbichoscimv
metrics.value: ~2049 likes, 442 check-ins

metrics.label: Website tracking stack
metrics.value: GTM-N8JQ6R8 + Google Tag GT-TQVKNZR present

metrics.label: Meta Pixel
metrics.value: ABSENT — no fbq/connect.facebook.net/fbevents.js; cannot retarget 12.9k IG audience or track Meta conversions

metrics.label: Conversion funnel
metrics.value: WhatsApp 5565992145232 hardcoded 11x on homepage; no booking/form-to-CRM

metrics.label: Engagement rate sample
metrics.value: 211 likes / 8520 = ~2.5% on one reel 2024-11-26 (single data point)

metrics.label: Posting cadence per week
metrics.value: 1231 posts implies regular; per-week needs timeline scrape

metrics.label: YouTube @clubedosbichos
metrics.value: channel indexed, stats JS-walled

metrics.label: Meta Ad Library active ads
metrics.value: 403 + JS-rendered; no Meta Pixel is strong indirect signal of NO tracked Meta ads

metrics.label: Google Ads Transparency
metrics.value: JS-rendered login/empty; Google Tag present != proof of campaigns

metrics.label: Ad creative images
metrics.value: both ad libraries JS-walled to plain fetch

dim_a_presence.pitch_angle: You have 12.9k followers across two Instagram accounts but no Meta Pixel on your site — you're paying for attention you can't measure or re-target. Three gaps: split brand, no pixel, WhatsApp-only untracked funnel.

metrics.label: Title tag
metrics.value: Clinica Veterinaria | Clube dos Bichos | (65) 99214-5232 (keyword-rich)

metrics.label: Meta description
metrics.value: present, 156 chars, but no neighborhood/city keyword

metrics.label: Mobile viewport + canonical
metrics.value: both present + correct (canonical guards legacy domains)

metrics.label: SEO plugin
metrics.value: Rank Math on WordPress, OG tags present (actively managed)

metrics.label: Schema gaps
metrics.value: JSON-LD LocalBusiness minimal — MISSING address, geo, telephone, openingHours, aggregateRating, priceRange; NOT typed VeterinaryCare; lost rich-result eligibility

metrics.label: XML sitemap
metrics.value: Rank Math sitemap_index.xml, ~31 URLs, some updated 2026-04-30

metrics.label: Homepage lead form
metrics.value: no inline <form> — relies on WhatsApp/phone click

metrics.label: Rank 'clinica veterinaria Centro Sul Cuiaba'
metrics.value: #1 and #2 (homepage + /sobre-nos)

metrics.label: Rank 'pet shop ... Porto Cuiaba MT'
metrics.value: top-3 (#2), service pages also indexed

metrics.label: Rank broad 'veterinario Cuiaba melhor clinica'
metrics.value: present but NOT #1 — outranked by Vivet, Candido Mariano, aggregators

metrics.label: Core Web Vitals / Lighthouse
metrics.value: heavy galleria 70+ imgs suggests LCP risk; needs PageSpeed Insights

metrics.label: Ranked-keyword set + positions over time
metrics.value: ~31 pages confirmed; full ranked set needs Search Console/DataForSEO

metrics.label: Backlink profile / domain authority
metrics.value: needed to explain broad-term gap; needs Ahrefs/Moz

dim_b_seo.pitch_angle: You OWN neighborhood searches (#1-2) but leak the big head term 'veterinario Cuiaba' to Vivet/Candido Mariano. Two fast wins: turn on the half-empty schema (free rich-result stars + map pin) and add a lead-capture form.

competitors.name: Hospital Veterinario Candido Mariano (HVCM)
competitors.hero_claim: ONLY veterinary ICU in MT + 25-vet roster

target_position.ig_followers: 4371 primary / 8520 secondary — LAST of three on reach
advantages: integrated pet shop retail (no rival has e-commerce)
disadvantages: no hero claim of its own
target_position.standing: MIDDLE-to-BEHIND — behind on social/social-proof, AHEAD on SEO breadth + multi-location + retail. Gap is marketing execution, not service capability.

dim_c_competitive.pitch_angle: Established since 2006, best website, only one with two central locations AND a pet shop — but Vivet has 4x your Instagram and Candido Mariano owns the 'only ICU in MT' headline. You win on substance, lose on visibility.

metrics.note: strong geo-anchor 2 units but site buries retail

own_prices.value: site says 'precos justos' but publishes ZERO R$

dim_d_keywords.pitch_angle: You win 'veterinario 24h Cuiaba' but you're INVISIBLE on the two highest-frequency money searches: 'banho e tosa Cuiaba' and your specialty terms where competitors barely show. Capturing ~27 of those/month is ~R$4k/mo new recurring revenue.

recommendations: Consolidate/cross-promote the two Instagram handles to recover fragmented 12.9k reach
Install Meta Pixel + Conversions API to retarget IG audience and track boosted-post conversions
Complete LocalBusiness schema (address, geo, telephone, hours, aggregateRating, priceRange) and type as VeterinaryCare for rich results
Add a 3-field lead-capture form on homepage alongside WhatsApp
Build dedicated landing pages for banho e tosa + specialty long-tails (oftalmo, felina, ortopedia)
Publish transparent 'a partir de R$' pricing as a conversion-lift lever
Push grooming + plano-saude-pet for recurring MRR

ticket.own_price_note: site publishes zero R$; replace with sales-call price list

demand_monthly.method: Cuiaba 660k pop * pet-ownership; NEEDS-TOOL DataForSEO for exact

recurring_lever.value: grooming client ~R$80 x 8 visits/yr ~= R$640 LTV/yr; plano-saude-pet from R$19,90/mo = MRR

dim_f_revenue.disclaimer: Marketing-attributable LIFT, not total revenue. Optimistic = upper bound contingent on full-funnel execution. Cuiaba 660k = deliberately SMALL realistic volumes, NOT inflated.

pitch_angles_consolidated: No Meta Pixel on a site with 12.9k IG audience = paying for attention you can't measure or retarget
Split brand across two Instagram handles bleeds reach for free
Own the neighborhood searches but leak the big city head term to Vivet/Candido Mariano
Half-empty schema = free rich-result stars + map pin left on the table
Invisible on banho-e-tosa (highest-frequency money search) and on your own specialty terms
WhatsApp-only funnel with no booking/CRM = every lead untracked
